name: evolver-tools
description: 208 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 208 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v25: macrogen — Macro/code template generator with 7 built-in templates
code-review — Static code review for Python files (AST analysis)
pdf-text — Extract text from PDF files (pdftotext, PyMuPDF, pure-Python fallback)
csv-view — CSV file viewer with table formatting, auto-detect delimiter, filters, sort
random-cli — Random data generator (numbers, strings, UUIDs, passwords)
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
